Re-Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Plntf Jason Kennedy To Respond To Special Interrogatories; Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendant's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection to form interrogatories set #1, request for production of documents set #1, and special interrogatories set #1 within 30 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $388.90 are to be paid by plaintiff individually within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
